sections.desEn:
1. Please obtain the DONATION FORM from Career Development and Alumni Service
  2. The "指定用途 / 單位" field on the form can be selected as follows:
    1. Check "院系務發展基金" and fill in "Department of Communications Design"
    2. Check "指定用途" and fill in "Degree Show, Department of Communications Design" or customize
  3. After completing the form, proceed to Career Development and Alumni Service for processing according to their instructions
sections.desZh:
1. 請至本校 職涯發展暨校友服務一組 取得捐款單
  2. 於「指定用途 / 單位」欄位可選：
    1. 勾選「院系務發展基金」並填寫「媒體傳達設計學系」
    2. 勾選「指定用途」並填寫「媒體傳達設計學系畢業展」或自訂
  3. 填寫完畢後依 職涯發展暨校友服務一組 之說明於該單位辦理

例如：設立獎學金

請洽學系辦公室
